meaning: n.传毒物(如病人衣物床褥等)
examples: Ingredients: Contain natural herb essence such as ginseng, Fomes japonica and liquorice.
Objective: To investigate the scavenging effects of fomes officinalis polysaccharides (FOPS) on oxygen free radicals.
A large number of mushroom species including Ganoderma lucidum, Coriolus versicolor, Fomes fomentarius, Tremella fuciformis and Lentinus edodes are traditionally used in Chinese folk medicines.
